summary: Iteration 61 - Backend Testing for Analytics Dashboard, Vehicle List Bug Fix, and E-Signature. All 24 tests passed. Analytics endpoints return all required KPIs. Vehicle list now correctly includes maintenance vehicles (Geneva: 7 vehicles including 1 in maintenance). E-signature endpoint working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/stats/advanced correctly returns all required fields: revenue_this_month, reservations_this_month, avg_booking_duration, revenue_per_vehicle, vehicle_utilization, payment_methods, weekly_trends, cancellation_rate
GET /api/admin/stats/tier-analytics correctly returns tier_stats array with name/bookings/revenue/avg_price, plus with_tier and without_tier counts
GET /api/vehicles no longer filters out maintenance status vehicles - bug fix verified
Geneva agency (63683791-8741-445a-be42-9e74861bee89) correctly returns 7 vehicles including 1 in maintenance (Range Rover Evoque P250)
PUT /api/contracts/{contract_id}/sign endpoint accepts signature_data and properly validates auth, contract existence, and signed status
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified: (1) Analytics dashboard endpoints fully working with all KPIs, (2) Vehicle list bug fixed - maintenance vehicles now included, (3) E-signature endpoint working. Geneva has 7 vehicles: 6 available + 1 maintenance (Range Rover Evoque P250).

vehicle_list_bug_fix.maintenance_included: PASS - Maintenance status vehicles NOT filtered out
vehicle_list_bug_fix.geneva_maintenance_vehicle: PASS - Range Rover Evoque P250 (status=maintenance) included

e_signature.already_signed_check: PASS - Returns 400 for already signed contracts
